    calculateGpa() - Method in class models.Student
    Calculates and returns the student's current GPA on a 4.0 scale.

    canRegister(List, Course) - Static method in class models.Course
    Returns true if adding newCourse would keep the student within the 21-credit-hour semester limit.

    Checks whether this student is eligible to register for the given course.

    Returns true if the student has not yet reached the maximum number of course failures (3).

    MAX_CREDITS - Static variable in class models.Course
    Maximum total credit hours a student may register for in one semester.
    MAX_FAILS - Static variable in class models.Course
    Maximum number of failed courses a student may accumulate before further course registration is blocked.
